output_dir.description: Base directory for outputs. Runner creates a per-run subdir like run-<timestamp> inside this.

platforms.description: Per-category (platform) config and auth, inherited by every fetcher in that category. Keyed by category name (e.g. 'aws', 'rippling').

config.description: Platform-wide config values. Keys match the category's config_schema (fetchers/_categories/<category>.yaml).

passthrough_env.description: Ambient env vars the runner should let through its whitelist for this platform (e.g. AWS_WEB_IDENTITY_TOKEN_FILE for IRSA). Use for cloud-identity auth where there is no secret value to set.

use.description: Fetcher name (matches the 'name' field in a discovered fetcher.yaml).

config.description: Typed config values for this fetcher (matches fetcher.yaml config_schema).

secrets.description: Top-level secrets (for non-per_target secrets). Values are ${env:VAR_NAME} references.

targets.description: List of targets for fanout fetchers (those with supports_targets: true).
